positive: A detailed, symmetrical graphic featuring a stylized majestic phoenix rising from vibrant, intricate floral patterns. The phoenix should have clean, bold lines and a dynamic, sweeping silhouette, rendered in deep sapphire blues, burnt orange, and radiant gold leaf accents. The background should be a minimalist, repeating mandala pattern composed of geometric foliage and celestial constellations. Full body view, centered composition, highly contrasting colors, vector graphic style, woodcut illustration quality, studio lighting, extremely detailed, suitable for textile print.
negative: blur, low quality, watermark, signature, text, artifact, cartoon, anime, poor anatomy, blurry edges, bad composition, extra limbs, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters
